hero.title: Turn Instagram comments into instant DM links
hero.body: Viewers comment a keyword like outfit, hair, or paint — CommentVia sends them an immediate DM with your product link.

workflow.title: Launch a comment-to-DM flow in minutes
workflow.body: The best creator tools keep the path short: pick the post, match the comment, send the right link, then watch what converts.
steps: Connect the post or Reel that is already getting attention.
Use keywords like outfit, link, recipe, size, price, or paint.
Tell commenters to check their inbox and deliver the shopping link.

useCases.title: Built for creators who sell through comments
items: Turn outfit, size, and link comments into private product links.
Send product lists when followers ask for hair, brush, or shade.
Deliver guides, templates, presets, or lead magnets from one keyword.

analytics.title: Know which comments become clicks
analytics.body: Track active rules, matched keywords, sent DMs, and link clicks so every caption gets smarter.

trust.title: Designed around the official Meta path
trust.body: Use tester accounts while building. For a public SaaS, request Meta App Review and Advanced Access for Instagram comment and messaging permissions.

pricing.title: Simple pricing for the first rule
pricing.body: Start with one automation, prove the workflow, then scale to more posts and campaigns.

faq.title: Questions creators ask first
items: Does this replace my link in bio?
No. It sends the exact link privately when someone asks in comments.
Can I use it before Meta approval?
You can test locally with app roles and tester accounts before public access.
Use a clear CTA like: Comment outfit and check your inbox.

cta.title: Ready to turn comments into customers?
cta.body: Create your first auto-DM rule and start sending the right link the moment someone asks.
